prompt: Create an appointments schema with tables: appointments (id, clinic_id, patient_id, doctor_id, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, status (scheduled/confirmed/completed/cancelled/no_show), type (in_person/online), reason, notes, created_by, created_at, updated_at) and appointment_reminders (id, appointment_id, reminder_type (sms/email/whatsapp), scheduled_at, sent_at, status). Reference the patients, doctors, and clinics tables already created.
